description: Model a 6-blade radial impeller in FreeCAD using the Part Design workbench. The design requires a 60mm diameter base plate (4mm thick) and a 20mm diameter central hub with a total height of 15mm from the bottom of the base. The center must feature a D-shaped shaft hole with a 6mm nominal diameter and a flat edge 2.5mm from the center. The impeller must have 6 rectangular blades, each 3mm thick and 10mm high from the top of the base, extending from the hub to the outer edge. Save the file to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/radial_impeller.FCStd.
